title: Washable Door Mats Indoor, Non-Slippery Front Door Mat Mushrooms Ferns, Super Soft Non Slip Doormat Retro Plants, Water Absorbent Floor Black Mats Entrance Rug 45x75 cm
features: Non-Slip Door Mat – Anti-Slip & Safe:Indoor Doormat With TPR And Cotton-Thread Backing Stays Firmly In Place On Smooth, Dry Floors, Preventing Slips And Falls, While Protecting Floors From Scratches And Staying Stable Under High Traffic, Pets, And Kids—Perfect For Front Door, Back Door, Or Entryway

Imitation Cashmere Rug – Low-Pile & Stylish: Imitation Cashmere Indoor Doormat With Mushrooms Ferns Print Features A Soft, Comfortable Texture And Ultra-Thin 0.6 Cm Profile That Fits Under Doors Without Jamming, Lightweight Yet Durable, Adding A Touch Of Retro Plants Visual Appeal To Any Entryway, Bedroom, Or Office

Water-Absorbent Mat – Super Absorbent: Indoor Doormat With Soft, Dense Pile Efficiently Soaks Up Moisture Like A Sponge, Keeping Entryways, Hallways, Or Mudrooms Dry On Rainy Or Snowy Days, While Enhancing The Look Of Any Space Including Front/Back Door, Bedroom, Living Room, Kitchen, Office, Or Bathroom

Machine Washable Rug – Easy-to-Clean & Durable: Machine-Washable Indoor Doormat With Microfiber And Polyester Fibers Traps Dirt, Mud, And Pet Hair Effortlessly, Can Be Vacuumed, Hand-Washed, Or Gently Machine-Washed, And Retains Its Shape And Vibrant Appearance Even After Repeated Cleaning—Ideal For Entryways, Kitchens, Hallways, Or Offices

Indoor Doormat – Multipurpose & Long-Lasting: Indoor Doormat With Reinforced Edges Fits Under Low Doors And Works In Entrances, Front/Back Doors, Kitchens, Bathrooms, Bedrooms, Living Rooms, Hallways, Corridors, Or Porches, While Colors Stay Vibrant And Wrinkles Gradually Smooth With Simple Care
description: Upgrade Your Home With CEDNXOER’s Stylish & Functional 3D Printed Indoor Doormat Make Your Entrance More Inviting With Our High-Quality 3D Printed Indoor Rug. Designed For Style, Function, And Durability, It Adds Personality To Your Front Door, Back Door, Or Entryway While Keeping Your Floors Clean, Safe, And Dry. Perfect As A Water-Absorbent, Low-Pile, Anti-Slip Entryway Rug For Kitchens, Living Rooms, Bedrooms, Or Any Indoor Space. Soft & Low Pile Front Made Of Imitation Cashmere With A Soft, Short Pile And Velvety Feel That Pets And Children Will Love Moving Around On. Perfect For Girls’ Bedrooms Or Any Room Needing A Cozy And Stylish Touch, Adding Comfort And Modern Interior Appeal. Non-Slip Rubber Rubber Backing Coated With TPR Prevents Movement, Protects Floors From Heavy Traffic, And Ensures Safety On Laminate, Hardwood, Or Tile Surfaces. Ideal As A Front Door Mat, Back Door Mat, Or Indoor Entryway Rug. Easy To Clean When Liquids Spill, Simply Wipe With A Cloth. Use A Handheld Vacuum To Remove Dust Or Hair. Machine Wash On A Gentle Cold Cycle While Retaining Shape And Vibrancy After Multiple Washes. Durable And Long-Lasting, Perfect As A Washable Indoor Door Mat. Widely Used Ideal For Various Indoor Spaces Including Entryways, Under Furniture, Kitchens, Living Rooms, Bedrooms, Corridors, And Door Areas. The Sleek 0.25" Low-Pile Height Allows Convenient Placement Anywhere, Including As A Kitchen Rug, Living Room Rug, Or Front/Back Door Mat. Care & Tips: To Remove Wrinkles, Lay Flat Or Reverse-Roll Overnight. Avoid Chlorine Or Bleach To Preserve Color And Texture. Suitable For High-Traffic Indoor Areas And Daily Use.

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Fade Resistant, Foldable, Non Slip, Shed Resistant, Washable
